display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
create_app
把 KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService 和 KnowledgeDocumentQueryService 注入到 app.state

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
POST /knowledge/documents
register_knowledge_document

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DELETE /knowledge/documents/{document_id}
delete_knowledge_document

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
POST /knowledge/documents/{document_id}/rechunk
rechunk_knowledge_document

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GET /knowledge/documents
list_knowledge_documents

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GET /knowledge/documents/files
list_knowledge_files

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GET /knowledge/documents/{document_id}
get_knowledge_document

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.register_document
1. 校验 chunk_size 和 chunk_overlap
2. 按顺序尝试 files_root 和 data_dir 读取源文件
3. 调用 publisher.publish_new_version

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.delete_document
1. 读取现有主记录
2. 停用当前文档分块
3. 软删除主记录
4. 组装删除结果

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.rechunk_document
1. 校验分块参数
2. 读取现有主记录
3. 重新读取原始文件
4. 调用 publisher.publish_new_version

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentPublisher.publish_new_version
1. build_document_id 计算 document_id
2. 计算下一个 document_version
3. build_document_chunks 生成新分块
4. 组装 version 和 record

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentPublisher 正式切换版本
1. upsert_document_chunks 写入新分块
2. upsert_document_record 切换主记录到新版本
3. deactivate_document_chunks 停用旧版本分块

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentMapper.to_operation_result
把主记录和版本号转换成 API 响应

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
失败回滚分支
1. 有旧版本时写回旧主记录
2. 重新激活旧版本分块
3. 首次建索引失败时写入 failed 主记录
4. 删除这次新写入的分块
5. 抛出 KnowledgeDocumentStoreError

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentQueryService.list_documents
1. 校验 namespace
2. 列出主记录
3. mapper.to_summary 转成列表项

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentQueryService.get_document
1. 读取单个主记录
2. 找不到时抛出 KnowledgeDocumentNotFoundError
3. mapper.to_detail 转成详情

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentQueryService.list_file_indexes
1. 校验 namespace
2. 读取主记录列表
3. 用 source_path 建映射表
4. 扫描上传目录全部受管文件
5. 判断每个文件能不能建索引
6. 输出 indexed 或 unindexed 摘要

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeManagedFileScanner.scan_files
扫描 files_root 下的 json、txt、md、csv、pdf、docx、xlsx 文件

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeManagedFileScanner.can_index
只允许 json、txt、md、csv 进入索引流程

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: KnowledgeDocumentMapper.to_summary / to_detail / to_indexed_file_summary / to_unindexed_file_summary

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentRepositoryGateway
统一调用仓储方法，并把 NotImplementedError 改成 KnowledgeDocumentStoreError

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VectorStoreFactory.create_document_repository
按配置创建 KnowledgeDocumentRepository

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VectorStoreFactory.create_retriever
按配置创建 KnowledgeRetriever

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentRepository 接口
ensure_document_indexes / upsert_document_record / list_document_records / upsert_document_chunks / activate 或 deactivate_document_chunks

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeRetriever 接口
search / upsert_documents / delete_documents / healthcheck

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ChromaVectorStore
用 collection 保存 documents 和 chunks

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ElasticsearchVectorStore
用 documents 和 chunks 索引保存主记录和分块

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EmbeddingStrategy
把文本转换成向量

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HybridRerankStrategy
把向量结果和关键词结果重新排序
